subcodes.first_line: O friends! May ye, through the grace of the All-Merciful, attain His bounties and abide beneath the shade of the Tree of His Cause in perfect assurance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان انشاء الله بعنایت رحمن فائز باشید و در ظل سدره امر با کمال اطمینان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
